content: Session started. Task: Research Kalshi API (REST + WebSocket) for engineering handoff. Delegating to Research team.
Delegated to Research Lead: Research Kalshi API docs + SDK, compare against existing arb-kalshi crate, produce engineering handoff.

Fetched Kalshi official docs (docs.kalshi.com), API reference, WebSocket docs, changelog. Found 4 breaking issues: wrong signing algo (PSS not PKCS1v15), wrong base URLs, wrong WS auth flow, wrong WS message envelope. Also found price format migration in progress.

Analyzed Kalshi official Python starter code, kalshi-rs community SDK, aiokalshi. Confirmed 4 breaking issues from doc research. Found 18 total findings (4 BREAKING, 8 SUBOPTIMAL, 6 MISSING). Key SDK source: github.com/Kalshi/kalshi-starter-code-python/blob/main/clients.py.

Synthesized doc + SDK findings into engineering handoff. 4 BREAKING issues (auth algo, URLs, WS auth flow, WS envelope), 8 SUBOPTIMAL (price migration, delta format, message fields), 6 MISSING features. Handoff includes implementation checklist in 4 phases.
Research phase complete. Handoff ready at phases/kalshi-research/research-handoff.md. Engineering can proceed with Phase 1 (4 breaking fixes).
